# Howell Insurance Group
> Independent health insurance agency in Brevard County, Florida

## About
Scott Howell is a licensed independent health insurance agent serving Brevard County, Florida and clients across 30+ states. He shops top-rated national and regional carriers to find private-sector PPO rates that aren't listed on public exchanges. His services are free to clients — carriers pay his commission.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://howellinsurancegroup.com/
- About Scott: https://howellinsurancegroup.com/about/

- FAQ: https://howellinsurancegroup.com/faq/
- Blog: https://howellinsurancegroup.com/blog/
- Contact: https://howellinsurancegroup.com/contact/

## Services
- Private PPO Health Plans
- ACA / Marketplace Plans
- Dental & Vision
- Supplemental & Critical Illness
- Income Protection
